title: Verify existing implementation of content-type-guard middleware
description: The content-type-guard middleware is already implemented in src/middleware/content-type-guard.ts with 17 passing tests in src/middleware/content-type-guard.test.ts. Verified: rejects requests with body but no Content-Type (400), allows requests without body regardless of Content-Type, allows requests with body and valid Content-Type (application/json, multipart/form-data).
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts and src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts use Express-style chainable middleware pattern
